goal: Polish the current community module UI so it feels more intentional and visually pleasant without altering or repainting any existing image assets.
constraints: Do not modify raster assets or replace existing images.
Keep the current community information architecture and interaction flow intact.
Prefer visual hierarchy, spacing, surface, and typography improvements over structural rewrites.
Limit edits to existing community UI components unless a minimal integration touch is necessary.
deliverables: Refine the community modal shell and main community views for stronger visual hierarchy.
Improve card/list/detail/composer surfaces so the module reads as a cohesive polished space.
Document the polish scope in a short audit note.
